description_long: This is a rustic stone cabin with a gable roof, set on a rectangular grassy plot with a stone-paved perimeter. The exterior walls are constructed from stacked stone, giving it a robust and traditional appearance, while the roof is made of dark, corrugated material with visible wooden beams at the gable ends. There is a single green door on the front facade, and a small green-framed window on the rear gable wall, both adding subtle color contrast to the otherwise earthy tones. A metal chimney protrudes from the roof, suggesting the presence of a fireplace or wood stove inside. The cabin sits on a slightly raised stone foundation, and the roof has a modest overhang for weather protection. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for residential or park settings.
description: A rustic stone cabin with a dark gable roof, green door, and window, set on a grassy plot with a stone-paved border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green door centered on the stone facade, with the dark gable roof and stone-paved area in front.
description_view_1: Side gable view highlighting the roof's overhang, visible wooden beams, and the green door on the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain stone wall and the roof's full length, with no visible doors or windows.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end featuring a small green-framed window centered on the stone wall, with visible roof beams.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs and visible wooden beams, covered in dark corrugated material
attribute_window_arrangement: one small, rectangular window centered on the rear gable wall, green-framed, no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: one green door centered on the front facade beneath the gable
